caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a podcast studio. He wears over-ear headphones and several gold chains around his neck. A professional microphone is positioned directly in front of him. In the background, a white wall features a logo with five stars and the words "EMPIRE HUSTLE" stacked vertically. To the right, a sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He begins by looking forward, then turns his head slightly to the right, then looks back toward the center while gesturing with his right hand, and finally settles back into a forward-facing position. His facial expressions and posture shift as he communicates.
